dashboard.title: Dashboard

info.totalCustomers: Everyone who has added your loyalty card. The arrow shows the change vs last week.
info.loyalCustomers: The number of customers who came in at least twice in the last 6 months.

dashboard.recentScansEmptyBody: Stamps your team adds will show up here.
dashboard.firstRunBody: Show this QR code at your counter. Customers scan it to add your card to Apple Wallet or Google Wallet, no app to download.
dashboard.firstRunWaysTitle: Three ways to get them scanning
dashboard.firstRunWayCounterDesc: Print the QR code and put it where customers pay.
dashboard.firstRunWaySocialDesc: Share your card link in your bio and posts.
dashboard.firstRunWayCommsDesc: Add the link to your emails and replies.
dashboard.nearRewardCaption: {count, plural, =0 {No one is close right now.} one {# customer is 1 to 2 stamps away.} other {# customers are 1 to 2 stamps away.}}
dashboard.slippingCaption: {count, plural, =0 {No one has slipped. Nice.} one {# customer has not visited in 30+ days.} other {# customers have not visited in 30+ days.}}
dashboard.oneThingWinBack: {count, plural, one {# customer is slipping away. Win them back before they forget you.} other {# customers are slipping away. Win them back before they forget you.}}
dashboard.oneThingInstall: Only {rate}% of your customers installed their card. Share your QR code to lift it.
dashboard.oneThingNearReward: {count, plural, one {# customer is close to a reward. A nudge helps them finish.} other {# customers are close to a reward. A nudge helps them finish.}}
dashboard.oneThingAllGood: Your program is humming along. Keep stamping.
dashboard.rewardsLeft: {count, plural, =1 {1 reward left} other {# rewards left}}
